title: Bionano Genomics Inc Common Stock (BNGO) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) earnings calendar and forecast data on NASDAQ show scheduled quarterly earnings announcements and analyst estimate revisions. Historical earnings dates: Q1 2026 reported May 13, 2026; Q4 2025 reported March 23, 2026; Q3 2025 reported November 2025; Q2 2025 reported August 2025. Analyst revenue consensus for recent quarters has centered around $6-7M per quarter, with the company tracking near estimates. EPS estimates are negative, reflecting the path to profitability. Key metrics analysts track: consumables revenue growth (target 15-20% annually), flow cell unit sales (target 8,000+ units quarterly), installed base growth (targeting 400+ systems), gross margin expansion (targeting 50%+), and operating expense reduction. Guidance: full-year 2026 revenue $30-33M. Q2 2026 guidance $7.5-7.8M. Management targets cash flow breakeven by Q4 2027.
